stories: Rates shock: U.S. 30-year yield pops above ~5.1% (near 1-year highs), raising the bar for equity multiples
China signals a concrete U.S.–China de-escalation channel: expand ag trade via tariff cuts + tackle non-tariff barriers
Sanctions/oil: Trump says he’ll decide “soon” on lifting sanctions tied to Chinese firms buying Iranian oil
Ukraine deep-strike escalation: Moscow region hit in biggest drone attack in over a year; civilians reported killed
Energy policy tightening impulse: U.S. allows a Russian oil sanctions waiver to lapse (per reporting)
Middle East: Israel conducts new strikes despite Gaza ceasefire; drone/strike dynamics keep escalation risk elevated
UK macro risk pulse: gilts volatile as political pressure mounts on PM Starmer
Insider signal (UPST): CEO Paul Gu family trust buys 50,000 shares at $27.50 (~$1.375M)
Insider supply/overhang (EXTR): Extreme Networks CEO sold ~100,000 shares at ~$23.07 (~$2.31M)
Crypto deleveraging: ~$500M in longs liquidated as bitcoin slides to ~$78,000; COIN becomes the equity “tell”
